response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal phonetics for both 'Bug' and 'Phony' perfectly match the provided Reference JSON. The introductory narration matches the burnt-in subtitles. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the Reference JSON for song lyrics and translations; manual transcription was used for the intro narration and on-screen credit titles. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal onsets. Applied aggressive end-time truncation during the rapid-fire sections of both songs to prevent cascading delays, and included visual text for song titles and credits during instrumental breaks.
